title: MWholesome Freshly Fermented Kimchi Lentil Wrap
description: A quick-fix Kenyan dish featuring floral green and red lentils, fermented kimchi, for a crunchy, raw-friendly snack or light meal.
instructions: Soak green and red lentils in water for 30 minutes.
Cook lentils until tender, about 25-30 minutes on medium heat with a little olive oil if needed.
Mix kimchi, dijon mustard, lemon juice, salt, and olive oil to create a flavorful sauce. Adjust seasoning as desired.
Heat wrap leaves gently in the oven at 170°C (340°F) for about 5-7 minutes or until slightly wilted but still crisp.
Assemble wraps by placing cooked lentils on each wrap leaf, adding kimchi-dijon mixture, and any other desired toppings such as finely chopped fresh herbs or a drizzle of extra olive oil.
Serve warm and enjoy your MWholesome Freshly Fermented Kimchi Lentil Wrap.
